# Sell the Client Docs You Already Use

**Use AI to turn your proposals, intake forms, and messaging frameworks
into paid templates.**

---

## What This Kit Gives You

A 5-asset system to help you turn one of your existing client documents
into a paid template on Gumroad — in under a week.

No new skills required. No large audience required.
You already have the raw material.

---

## The 5 Assets

| # | File | Purpose | When |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Client_Docs_Inventory_Sheet.md | Find the right document to sell | Day 1 |
| 2 | Paid_Template_Idea_Finder.md | Turn that document into a product concept | Day 2 |
| 3 | Template_Offer_Builder.md | Write the offer copy for your Gumroad page | Day 3 |
| 4 | Gumroad_Sales_Page_Template.md | Build your complete Gumroad listing | Day 4 |
| 5 | Seven_Day_Launch_Email_and_Post_Pack.md | Launch and drive first buyers | Days 5–7 |

---

## Your 7-Day Path

**Day 1 — Find your document**
Open Asset 1. Spend 20–30 minutes scoring your existing client documents.
Identify the one to turn into your first paid template.

**Day 2 — Define your product**
Open Asset 2. Turn your top document into a clear product concept:
name, buyer, price, format.

**Day 3 — Write your offer copy**
Open Asset 3. Write the headline, benefit bullets, and description
you'll use on Gumroad and in emails.

**Day 4 — Build your Gumroad page**
Open Asset 4. Copy the sections directly into Gumroad.
Publish your product page.

**Days 5–7 — Launch**
Open Asset 5. Use the 7 email templates and 7 LinkedIn posts
to drive your first buyers.

---

## What You Need Before You Start

- Your existing client documents (wherever you store them)
- A free Gumroad account
- A free Claude or ChatGPT account (for the AI prompts)
- 1–2 hours per day for 7 days

---

## How the AI Prompts Work

Every asset includes AI prompts you can paste directly into Claude or ChatGPT.
Replace anything in [BRACKETS] with your own details before pasting.

The prompts are designed to help you:
- Identify which document to sell first
- Generate product names
- Write your offer copy and Gumroad description
- Create LinkedIn posts for launch week
- Adapt your document for a general audience

You don't need any AI experience to use them.
Copy, replace the brackets, paste, and edit the output.

---

## URL Placeholders in This Kit

Some documents reference URLs that you'll replace once you've set up your accounts:

| Placeholder | What it is |
|---|---|
| {{GUMROAD_LINK}} | Your Gumroad product URL |
| {{TALLY_QUIZ_LINK}} | Your Tally quiz URL (optional, for the email funnel) |
| {{SUPPORT_EMAIL}} | Your email address for buyer support |

Replace these before sending emails or publishing posts.

---

## What Comes Next

**After 10 sales at $19:** Raise the price to $29.

**After 20 sales:** Consider bundling your remaining documents into a $49 product.

**For buyers who want more help:** The $99 Paid Template Product Audit
lets you offer a personalized review of someone's client documents —
identifying what to sell, how to price it, and how to write the listing.

Each step follows from the first.
Start with the $19 template.
